text:
- Distfile disappear from mastersite:
	# cd /usr/ports/sysutils/fastest_cvsup/ && make fetch

	fetch: http://www.is-root.com/myports/fastest_cvsup-0.2.8.tar.gz: Not Found

	- Take maintainership
